mapper.select: select id, page, blog_id from comment where id=#{id}
mapper.insert: insert into comment (nickname, email, content, avatar, create_time, website, ip, is_published, is_admin_comment, page, is_notice, parent_comment_id, blog_id, user_id, qq) values (#{nickname}, #{email}, #{content}, #{avatar}, #{createTime}, #{website}, #{ip}, #{published}, #{adminComment}, #{page}, #{notice}, #{parentCommentId}, #{blogId}, #{userId}, #{qq})
